All right, so in the last video we placed our tracker, so our pixel, inside of our click funnels, but we still need to tell it what to track. So in order to do that, we need to create a custom conversion. So I'm going to go ahead and click on this create a custom conversion button right here, but before I do, I do want to show you a few other places it could be located because there are a few different versions of Facebook Business Manager. So you could find it right here or it is notated by this star symbol right here. So I'm going to go ahead and click on that create a custom conversion button. And now I'm going to go back to my click funnel and I'm going to go to the thank you page. I'm going to copy the entire URL of the thank you page. And then I'm going to go back over here and paste it as my rule for my custom conversion. The next thing I'm going to do is I'm going to name my custom conversion. So I'm going to call this one thank you page lead. And then I'm going to categorize my custom conversion as well. So I'm categorizing this as a lead because in order to get to the thank you page, my client would have to fill out that pop up, which would mean that I would have their information. So now that I've clicked the create and done button, we can see the custom conversion right over here. It's not active yet, so we are going to need to activate it. And the only way to do that is going to be to send it some traffic. So I'm going to go ahead and launch my thank you page. And I'm just going to refresh it a few times. Usually about six times will work. If it's not working in your browser, then try opening up an incognito window and refreshing it from there. So I've refreshed this about six times. So I'm going to come back over here to my custom conversions and refresh the page. And there we go. Now our custom conversion is active. So now we can get to the fun part. So in your next video, you'll be learning about how to make ads.
